bills_or_receipt.description: Rectangular paper with text blocks and numbers, typically neatly arranged

bank_statement.description: Document with transaction tables, charts, and bank logo formatting

letters_with_address.description: Folded document with typed address block and formal formatting

transcript.description: Multi-column academic-style document with dense text and numeric entries

mortgage_or_investment_report.description: Formal document with bold headers and financial data tables

medical_record_document.description: Multi-page document with medical charts or diagrams

doctors_prescription.description: Medical form with structured layout and identifying marks

local_newspaper.description: Full-page print layout with headlines, columns, and image thumbnails

credit_or_debit_card.description: Rectangular plastic card, metallic or colorful, with embedded logo/text

business_card.description: Small rectangular card printed with contact information and logo

pregnancy_test.description: Slim white plastic device with result window

pregnancy_test_box.description: Vertical rectangular box with product branding and test device illustration

condom_box.description: Small cardboard box, typically with commercial packaging design and small text

condom_with_plastic_bag.description: Small sealed transparent bag containing foil-wrapped item

empty_pill_bottle.description: Cylindrical container, typically white cap, translucent or opaque plastic material

tattoo_sleeve.description: Colored fabric or sleeve, often with flame or tribal patterns
